examples: They defiantly rejected any talk of a compromise.
He braced his shoulders defiantly as another squall of wet snow slashed across his face.
Braving snow and frost， the plum trees blossomed defiantly.
They stood by their client, who defiantly claimed in court that he didn't kill Savio.
"We are doing more good for people than any other pharmaceutical, " he says defiantly.
